subject: Wire Transfer Authorization - Vendor Payment
body:
Treasury Team,

Please process the following wire transfers. All have been approved per our dual-authorization policy:

1. AWS Inc.
   Amount: $198,450.00
   Account: Chase ***4521
   Reference: INV-2026-Q1-AWS
   Due date: March 25, 2026

2. Zurich Engineering GmbH (subsidiary payroll funding)
   Amount: EUR 285,000.00
   Account: UBS ***7832
   Reference: PAYROLL-ZH-MAR2026
   Due date: March 28, 2026

3. Morrison & Associates LLP (legal fees)
   Amount: $45,000.00
   Account: Wells Fargo ***9103
   Reference: LEGAL-FEB2026
   Due date: March 22, 2026

Total USD equivalent: ~$553,450

Bank balance after transfers: ~$8.15M
All supporting invoices and approvals are in the shared drive under /Finance/AP/March2026/

Please confirm execution with wire confirmation numbers.
